title: Stepping inside the life you said wasn't yours
subtitle: A five-minute guided visualisation for trying on the financial life you have been excluding yourself from.
excerpt: A guided visualisation for Day 16 of the MONEY program. You step inside the specific financial life you have been watching from the outside and discover what it feels like when the exclusion belief is removed.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 16 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use after the Day 16 tapping, when the exclusion belief has started to loosen and you want to try the alternative.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for trying on the financial life you have been observing from the outside. The practice asks: what if the exclusion was the only thing keeping you out?
— the grounding principles are the same.
Sit comfortably with your eyes closed. Take three slow breaths.

Bring to mind the financial life you have been watching from the outside — the person or type of life you have silently excluded yourself from. See it clearly: what they earn, how they work, what they own, how they handle money.
Now picture yourself standing at the edge of it. There is a doorway — a threshold between the life you have been watching and the life you are allowed to enter.

Step through it. You are now inside that financial life. Stand in it for a moment. Notice what you see, what you hear, what the room feels like around you. It's ordinary here. The people here are not special in the way you thought — they just didn't have the exclusion belief.
Notice how it fits. Not perfectly — nothing fits perfectly at first. But it fits enough.
Open your eyes when ready. Write one line about what you noticed.
Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 16 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
